scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/server" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/ui"
scripts.start: npm run build:packages && concurrently "npm run start --workspace=apps/server" "npm run build --workspace=apps/ui && npm run preview --workspace=apps/ui"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace=apps/ui && npm run build --workspace=apps/server
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @automaker/types && npm run build -w @automaker/platform && npm run build -w @automaker/utils -w @automaker/spec-parser && npm run build -w @automaker/prompts -w @automaker/model-resolver -w @automaker/dependency-resolver && npm run build -w @automaker/git-utils
scripts.rebuild: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules libs/*/node_modules && npm install
